title: Origins-Magic
description: An Origins Reborn origin addon for PaperMC servers, adding 8 new origins themed on magic
body:
# Origins-Magic  
Origins-Magic is an [Origins Reborn](https://modrinth.com/plugin/origins-reborn) addon which adds 8 magic themed origins.

Add this to the server plugins folder with Origins-Reborn and restart the server to begin playing with the new origins!

For support join the [Starshooter](https://discord.gg/dQGaXgxMpg) discord server.

## Server Hosting (Advertisement)
[![Create a server on Bisect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c367e7ba28598bc811ff7d632c22ebed744ff3.png)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/comet)

## Included origins:
- Alchemist
  - Potions you drink and throw are a level stronger and last twice as long.
  - Right clicking on copper with an empty hand turns it to gold, and vice versa.
  - You deal only 0.75x damage.
  - You have only 3 hearts when touching water.
- Telekinetic
  - You can interact with blocks, entities and items further away than normal.
  - Drops from entities and blocks go straight into your inventory.
  - You deal only 0.75x damage.
  - You have only 3 hearts when touching water.
- Healer
  - You can survive death once every 10 minutes.
  - When you right click on something, it gets Regeneration 2 for 10 seconds.
  - When standing still you have infinite Regeneration 2.
  - You deal only 0.75x damage.
  - You have only 3 hearts when touching water.
- Hypnotist
  - Right clicking on a monster makes it attack the last other thing you hit.
  - Right clicking on a player gives them Nausea for 30 seconds.
  - You deal only 0.75x damage.
  - You have only 3 hearts when touching water.
- Necromancer
  - Undead monsters nearby to you target whatever you hit.
  - You can swing your fist to bring nearby dead players that have not respawned back to life where they died.
  - You have more health and deal more damage in the nether, and have less health and deal less damage outside the nether.
  - Undead monsters won't attack you unprovoked.
  - Villagers refuse to trade with you.
  - You have only 3 hearts when touching water.
- Spirit
  - Your footsteps are not detected by Sculk Sensors.
  - You are invisible when standing still, as if using an Invisibility potion.
  - You have more health and deal more damage in the nether, and have less health and deal less damage outside the nether.
  - You have only 3 hearts when touching water.
- Warlock
  - Whenever you kill something, you absorb some of its health for up to 30 extra hearts.
  - Upon hitting something, it gains a negative effect for 15 seconds.
  - Undead monsters won't attack you unprovoked.
  - You can't use enchantments or potions.
  - Villagers refuse to trade with you.
  - You have only 3 hearts when touching water.
- Shadowmancer
  - You are fully invisible and cannot be interacted with by others in dark areas.
  - You deal increased damage in the dark, and reduced damage in the light.
  - You are set on fire in light, even from things like torches.
  - You take double damage from fire.
  - You are not affected by Fire Resistance.
  - You have only 3 hearts when touching water.
